items.raw_desc: LTE antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G:        Directional antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G with cross-polarization is the optimal solution for 4G/5G reception and backward compatible with LTE/2G/3G in areas with weak signal. Two integrated 2 MIMO antennas with opposite polarization support diversity of reception and thus ensure a quality signal. Compared to the previous generation, this antenna has a redesigned inner part for even higher efficiency. In addition to the new bands, the gain at 1700 MHz and 2.7 GHz is approximately 3 dB higher than the previous generation. Antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G  is supplied with double low-loss cable HDF-195 of 5 m length terminated with 2× SMA-m connector. The SMA connector used is commonly used in a wide range of routers. To maximize signal quality and minimize potential transients, the antenna does not use connectors and the cable is connected directly. items.raw_desc: Switch Mercusys MS128GP 28-Port Gigabit with 24-Port PoE+:Switch je funkční síťový komponent propojující koncová zařízení či jiné síťové prvky. Je dělaný k řízení síťového provozu. Mercusys MS128GP 28-Port Gigabit with 24-Port PoE+ je navržený k instalaci do rozvaděče. Tento typ dokáže zaujmout svou přepínací kapacitou 448 Gb/s. Switch je vybaven 26 × RJ-45 portů, které jsou poskytnuty k propojení se síťovými prvky. Celkem 2 konektory typu SFP využijete k  přenosu dat skrz optická vlákna. Technologie 10/100/1000Base-T je schopna šířit data až při rychlosti 1000 Mbit/s. You will thus still be able to connect other electronics. You'll be well aware of the status of your network, thanks to the signalling diodes.
